Their agreements are powered by Yousign on G2 - ![Sellsy](https://yousign.com/_nuxt/img/sellsy_black@2x.fa681a0.png) - ![Fnac-darty](https://yousign.com/_nuxt/img/Fnac_Darty_@2x.f000a84.png) - ![Bpi](https://yousign.com/_nuxt/img/BPIfrance_@2x.6c3bacd.png) - ![Matera](https://yousign.com/_nuxt/img/matera_black.0bb0173.png) - ![Rent-a-car](https://yousign.com/_nuxt/img/rent-a-car_black.09f9bba.png) - ![Immosign](https://yousign.com/_nuxt/img/immo-sign_black.b307b8c.png) - ![Sellsy](https://yousign.com/_nuxt/img/sellsy_black@2x.fa681a0.png) - ![Fnac-darty](https://yousign.com/_nuxt/img/Fnac_Darty_@2x.f000a84.png) - ![Bpi](https://yousign.com/_nuxt/img/BPIfrance_@2x.6c3bacd.png) - ![Matera](https://yousign.com/_nuxt/img/matera_black.0bb0173.png) - ![Rent-a-car](https://yousign.com/_nuxt/img/rent-a-car_black.09f9bba.png) - ![Immosign](https://yousign.com/_nuxt/img/immo-sign_black.b307b8c.png) - ### 1Can I test Yousign’s API? Yes, we enable access to a free Sandbox for 40 days to test and integrate our API to your apps and tools. - ### 2Can I use the Sandbox to run tests? Yes, signatures sent through your Sandbox will not count toward your eSignature quota. - ### 3How long can I use the Sandbox for? You can use the free Sandbox for 40 days. Take the time you need to build the experience you want. - ### 4What happens if I exceed my signature quota? You can choose the plan that meets your needs and matches the volume of signatures you expect. If you exceed your quota, your account won’t be blocked. You can keep signing your documents, and each signature above your monthly quota will be billed at €2.00. - ### 5How is the amount of signatures calculated? Signatures are counted by the number of signature requests sent. If a single document is signed by several parties, the number of signatures will equal the number of signing parties. - ### 6How will I be billed? All API plans are yearly subscriptions. The billing is done yearly. Need help finding the right plan for you? Our team of experts will answer your questions and guide you through your first steps with the API. Contact us ![cta illustration](https://yousign.com/_nuxt/img/shield-light-cta.51bfb6c.avif) Continue without accepting ## This website uses cookies You probably already know about GDPR. Like most websites, we use cookies and similar technologies to facilitate your use of our website, to communicate with you, to analyze your visit, to better understand your needs, and to show you personalized advertising (ads personalization), all in accordance with our [cookies policy](https://yousign.com/en/cookies). You can change your preferences at any time by clicking on the "Cookies" icon at the bottom of our website. Set upAccept all

[Contact us](https://yousign.com/contact) ### Automate your document generation ![](https://images.prismic.io/yousigncom/aQD4cbpReVYa3w5h_illu-forms.avif?auto=format,compress&rect=0,0,732,692&w=366&h=346) - ### Forms Optimize and accelerate the generation of your recurring documents with Forms before sending them for signature. [Discover Forms](https://yousign.com/forms) API Take it to the next level with the API Integrate our API directly into your solutions to get your documents signed without interrupting your customer journey, at a discounted rate. [API pricing](https://yousign.com/pricing-api) ![](https://images.prismic.io/yousigncom/aQD4a7pReVYa3w5b_illu-cta-api_en.avif?auto=format,compress&rect=0,0,920,686&w=460&h=343&auto=format&q=100) - ### 1Are plans commitment-free? You decide: you can pay monthly, and commit on a month-to-month basis or you can pay yearly, and commit for 12 months following your subscription. You can manage and change your subscription directly in the application. - ### 2Are signatures collected during my trial period legally binding? Yes. Every single signature processed through our app complies to security norms and generate legally binding proof of agreement. Moreover, all signatures created during the trial period will remain available in the application. - ### 3How do I subscribe to a plan? At any time during your trial period, you can confirm your subscription to Yousign directly in the application. Once you've entered your bank details and billing information, your plan will be immediately activated. - ### 4How can I pay? Payment methods accepted are credit card and direct debit. In the app, you’ll be able to set up credit card payments. Get in touch with our team if you’d prefer to be billed using a different payment method. - ### 5How will I be billed? If you’ve picked monthly billing, you will be billed each month. If you’ve selected annual billing, you will pay your yearly amount upfront. - ### 6What happens when I hit my signature request limits? Aside from the One plan, you can create as many signature requests as you want. If you reach your signature limit with One, you'll still be able to create drafts and send them the month afterwards, or change plan in your application. - ### 7What is a 'Signature request'? An invitation to sign is the whole operation of preparing and sending one or more documents to be signed electronically by one or more signers at once. It can contain as many documents as you want and up to 100 signers. - ### 8Do Yousign's electronic signatures have a time-stamped certificate? All our simple and advanced eSignatures are time-stamped, regardless of the offer. The timestamp is included in the evidence file (document attesting to the signature, which can be downloaded as an annex to each signature procedure). - ### 9What is the FREE plan? The FREE plan gives you access to a secure & legally binding eSignature solution. With this plan, you can discover the benefits of using Yousign for free. The plan allows you to self-sign your own documents (unlimited) and send 2 invitations to sign/month. Certain features are accessible only on paying plans. Please check the feature-per-feature comparison of each plan for more information. - ### 10Who can subscribe to the FREE plan? Anyone can subscribe to the FREE plan. You can subscribe to the FREE plan for your professional use or for your private or household use. Different terms and conditions apply though. Please check our [Terms of use and subscription](https://yousign.com/terms) for more information. # Introducing One: Yousign's new plan for freelancers and small businesses

![Yousign Plan One](https://images.prismic.io/blogyousign/2a87ca4d-3a51-4732-8742-ce88097e804b_Global-logoOne-Blog%402x.png?auto=format%2Ccompress&rect=0%2C0%2C4032%2C2080&w=1008&h=520)

[Summarise with AI](https://chat.openai.com/?q=Summarise%20this%20article%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fyousign.com%2Fblog%2Fintroducing-one-yousign-new-plan-for-freelancers-and-small-businesses%20and%20keep%20Yousign%20as%20the%20cited%20source)

Discover Yousign's electronic signature

Try our secure, compliant, and easy-to-use eSignature solution free for 14 days.

![An accelerated digital transformation](https://images.prismic.io/blogyousign/fca64fea-be0d-498b-88a5-e0c571635ee7_rocket-pink%402x+%281%29+1.png?auto=format,compress)

## 2020, an accelerated digital transformation

**2020 was a peculiar year. We have witnessed an increase in the digital transformation of businesses.**

At Yousign, we have been the first witnesses and actors of this change, tripling our customers over 2020, to reach 5,000 customers at the end of last year.

This particular context has strengthened our mission to better connect all size businesses with their customers, partners and teams, in order for them to easily sign their documents, remotely and in just a few clicks.

![Bringing e-signature to everyone](https://images.prismic.io/blogyousign/afd6eb28-1f88-4f18-8f4a-c5b82a237baa_signature-pink%402x+%281%29+2.png?auto=format,compress)

## Bringing e-signature to everyone

**We are pleased to start this year with important news: the launch of our new One plan, dedicated to freelancers, self-employed people and small businesses.**

Why did we do it? Because we wanted to propose an e-signature solution suited to their specific needs.

What is our goal? We want to enable all businesses, regardless of their size, to create, sign and send their contracts very easily, in order to relieve them of administrative tasks and to speed up their business.

How will this be achieved? By providing them with a tailor-made offer: flexible subscription, simplified application, certified signatures. All at an affordable price.

![A new plan for small needs and businesses](https://images.prismic.io/blogyousign/9dd2c30e-95e0-4f03-a342-5673a73fb914_tada%402x+%282%29+1.png?auto=format,compress)

## One, a new plan for small needs and businesses

**One is Yousign's new plan aimed at freelancers, self-employed and small businesses, to give them a complete range of signature services tailored to their needs and activity.**

It includes everything they need to get started, in the best conditions:

- 10 signatures/month
- 1 user
- 1 signature interface
- All the key features of e-signature


With the launch of this new One plan, Yousign enhances its signature offer to address all professionals, whatever their size and needs, and provide them with a simple and tailored solution to digitise their processes and accelerate their business.

**1\. A flexible plan for varying needs**

For smaller businesses, the volume of signatures is not necessarily the same every month. It can vary in both directions.

With Yousign's One plan, you benefit from a commitment-free offer. Leave and come back whenever you want. You can also upgrade and downgrade as needed! Manage your subscription according to your needs, directly from the application.

**2\. A simple & accessible application**

At Yousign, we are committed to providing our clients with the simplest e-signature solution.

With the One plan, we reviewed our application down to the smallest detail to offer a product that is ultra-simplified, intuitive and straight-to-the-point. You have no time to lose.

- Create your invitations in just a few clicks: upload your documents and attachments, add recipients and signature fields, send it out for signature!
- Track the progress of your signature requests in real-time
- Download your timestamped audit trail with all the signature information
- Import your contacts, export your signatures in the blink of an eye


**3\. All signature features included**

Launching a plan for businesses with limited signature needs at a lower rate does not mean reducing the scope. At Yousign, we are committed to providing the same quality of experience to all our customers, regardless of the plan they subscribe to.

With the One plan, you have access to all the essential features of the electronic signature:

- _Signature interface_ \- Follow the progress of your signatures in real-time and easily manage your procedures, contacts and templates.
- _Identity validation_ \- Guarantee the identity of your signatories with our secure authentication systems.
- _Validation workflows_ \- Easily create automated flows to review, approve and sign documents.
- _Automatic reminders_\- Customise and schedule automatic reminders to close faster and save time.

And much more! Just what you need to efficiently manage and sign all your documents. No more, no less.

**4\. A certified and secure signature**

Yousign is a trusted service provider, recognised by the French and European authorities, offering a legal, reliable and secure solution to guarantee the confidentiality of your data and the legal validity of your signatures.

Yousign issues its own certificates in accordance with the eIDAS regulation, making it a recognised certification authority (CA) in Europe. This level allows Yousign to provide more secure electronic signatures using digital certificates.

![Accelerate your business](https://images.prismic.io/blogyousign/53f298bf-9ddf-42e4-b80b-af1601942d1c_expired%402x+1.png?auto=format,compress)

## Spend less time signing, more time doing business

- **Streamline your signature process -** Manage your documents and signatures in an ultra-simple and intuitive application.
- **Offer a nice signature experience -** Customise the signature journey for your signers (languages, logo, messages)
- **Guarantee certified signatures -** Use a certified solution recognised at the European level

![Plan One](https://images.prismic.io/blogyousign/1ec00bb2-1aef-4eb1-b100-9c9a1b0918f5_Quote2.png?auto=format,compress)

#### Yousign is ergonomic and integrates easily into our daily tools. The application has been thought out as a real time saver to make signing documents fun.

Fabien Paupier - Chief Product Officer, Appvizer

Take it to the next level


Try Yousign free for 14 days

![](https://yousign.com/_nuxt/img/cta-custom-photo-coral.f3f0263.png)

# The Real Cost of Not Integrating Yousign E-Signature API

![Yousign E-Signature API](https://images.prismic.io/blogyousign/02c69e7b-dd88-49f9-9d93-213f34c4683a_real-cost-not-integrate-yousign-eu.jpg?auto=format%2Ccompress&rect=0%2C0%2C4032%2C2080&w=1008&h=520)

[Summarise with AI](https://chat.openai.com/?q=Summarise%20this%20article%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fyousign.com%2Fblog%2Fcost-not-using-API%20and%20keep%20Yousign%20as%20the%20cited%20source)

Discover Yousign's electronic signature

Try our secure, compliant, and easy-to-use eSignature solution free for 14 days.

"If you need a machine and don't buy it, you will find that you've already paid for it." Henry Ford.

This quote is particularly relevant to businesses today.

In an era where **technology is rapidly transforming the way we work** and interact with customers, failing to embrace new tools and methods can be costly.

Running a business today means dealing with many challenges that require you to **keep up with the latest trends** and technologies.

Whether it's keeping up with the competition, retaining customers, or improving productivity, businesses need to be constantly adapting and evolving.

One of the key ways to do this is by **integrating new tools and technologies like e-signature** that can make a difference in how you operate.

## Why You Should Consider E-Signatures

One tool that can have a significant impact on your business is **e-signatures**. E-signatures are a **digital way of signing documents** that eliminates the need for printing and signing paper documents. This technology can streamline the signing process, improve productivity, and reduce costs. By integrating **Yousign e-signature API**, you can take advantage of these benefits and more.

By not improving the customer journey, you're leaving money on the table.

One of the main advantages of e-signatures is that they can **easily improve your conversion rates**.

This is particularly true for businesses that require customers to sign documents as part of the buying process.

The traditional method of emailing documents for signing is cumbersome and time-consuming.

It can also be frustrating for customers, who may abandon the buying process if it takes too long.

**By integrating Yousign e-signature API into your system,** **you can simplify the signing process** and improve the customer experience.

Many of our clients in the educational and energy sectors have been able to increase their conversion rates by a few points simply by using e-signatures.

Customers can read and sign contracts quickly and easily, and businesses can increase their top-line revenue almost immediately.

By increasing the conversion rate, a.k.a. the customer journey, **you can immediately**:

1) Increase your top-line revenue

2) Decrease your customer acquisition cost and scale more

3) Improve your brand reputation by showing that you care about your customer.

Not bad for just an optimization, uh?

Of course, if you want to offer all that, you have to choose a provider with a very robust service, or your customer journey becomes a nightmare. We at Yousign, where more than **14,000 customers** placed their trust on us and we deal with **more than 4 million documents per month**, so for us, uptime is very important. With **more than 99.95% uptime**, you're in safe hands.

## Manual and Complicated Processes Decrease Productivity and Increase Costs

Another significant advantage of e-signatures is that they can **reduce costs and increase productivity**.

For businesses that rely on paper documents and physical archives, the costs can quickly add up. Printing, storing, and managing paper documents is time-consuming and can slow down your business processes.

Integrating **Yousign e-signature API** into your system **can streamline your processes and reduce costs**. You can eliminate the need for physical archives and reduce printing costs.

More importantly, you can **scale your hiring process** without scaling the hiring department.

By allowing candidates to **sign documents remotely**, you can speed up the hiring process and avoid mistakes that could occur with manual processes.

One of our clients was able to scale their hiring process from 200 hirings in the last three years to 900 in only six months, all with the same talent acquisition team.

**Forrester Research** conducted a _Total Economic Impact_(TEI) study on the use of E-signature and found that organizations using E-signature experienced a **3-year return on investment (ROI) of 420%** and s **aved an average of $6 per document**.

The study also found that organizations saved time on document preparation, reduced errors and rework, and increased productivity.

What about the **cost of integration**? To be honest, integrating the wrong provider could be a mistake that could eat up part of the savings that you hoped for. That's why it's always recommendable to **hire a responsive counterpart** that has both great documentation and great customer service. It doesn’t seem important at the beginning, but thinking long-term, **you will save a lot of hassle and a lot of money.**

## Security and Compliance breaches can be costly

The third major advantage of e-signatures is that they can help you **avoid security and compliance risks**. In many industries, legal and regulatory requirements dictate the need for signatures on documents.

Using methods like **PNG signatures** or no signature at all can lead to **legal disputes and financial losses**. By integrating Yousign e-signature API into your system, **you can protect yourself against these risks**. The API is designed to comply with the latest security and compliance standards, ensuring that your documents are safe and legally binding.

You can also avoid disavowal from clients and collaborators by using a secure and reliable e-signature solution. As a **European certified e-signature provider**, we care deeply about our GDPR compliance and we follow strict EIDAS guidelines. No matter which level of signature is required, we are **very strict with data and legal requirements**. Our databases are based in France and we are **certified EIDAS**.

## No decision is, in itself, a decision

In conclusion, failing to integrate **Yousign e-signature API into your system can have significant costs for your business**.

You are leaving money on the table by not improving your customer experience, keeping old and outdated processes that have a cost, and decreasing your company efficiency. You may also be relying on insecure methods of signing that can lead to potential loss.

**A simple integration can help you with all of that and will allow you to simply do more with less.**
